title: 4-regular planar unit triangle graphs without additional triangles
author_string: Mike Winkler, Peter Dinkelacker, Stefan Vogel
journal: Geombinatorics Quarterly Vol. XXIX, Nr. 2 (2019), Pages 72-77
journal_ref: Geombinatorics Quarterly Vol. XXIX, Nr. 2 (2019), Pages 72-77
abstract: In this article we proof the existence of 4-regular planar unit-distance graphs consisting only of unit triangles without additional triangles. It is shown that the smallest number of unit triangles is $\leq$6422.
